insight: MAJCOM-LB engine.py ships discipline_majcom/engine.py with NAF registry, aggregate rollup, strategic-policy promotion, SHUT IT DOWN #2304, Cooperative Defensive Patent Pledge #2260 admission, and CFP cross-MAJCOM interface. State lives at ~/.lb-majcom/.

SHUT IT DOWN (#2304) implemented as shutdown_activate/shutdown_unfreeze/shutdown_queue_action in engine.py. Frozen mode queues actions rather than executing them. Founder authorization (shutdown_unfreeze) returns queued actions for review. REST endpoints: POST /majcom/shutdown/activate + /majcom/shutdown/unfreeze + /majcom/shutdown/queue-action.

CFP (cfp.ts) extended with 5 cross-MAJCOM envelope types: majcom_aggregate_export, majcom_rule_proposal, majcom_policy_receipt, majcom_cross_majcom_pattern, band_audit_rollup. CFPEnvelope interface gains source_naf_id, source_majcom_id, destination_majcom, sphinx_band fields. Scale-invariance property: same signing primitive from Wing->NAF (K519) to NAF->MAJCOM->Band without modification.

Cooperative Defensive Patent Pledge (#2260) admission verification in engine.py: verify_pledge_admission(org_name, ein, org_type) validates EIN format + org_type eligibility + Pledge admission queue. Status: pending_manual_verification. Founder approval via approve_pledge_admission(). REST: POST /majcom/pledge/submit + /majcom/pledge/approve. Free to nonprofits/cooperatives/academic institutions via EIN.

The Sphinx Project Phase 1 operational as of K520. MAJCOM-LB = Band-NA founding MAJCOM. SphinxPhase1.tsx public page at /sphinx + /sphinx/phase-1 serves founding-partner recruitment with Pledge application form. MAJCOM admin UI at GET /majcom/admin (daemon_wrapper). 68/68 K520 Phase C checks pass.

Structural Bylaws enforcement: 6 bylaws (SB-001 through SB-006) cover membership=$5/yr, creator keep=83.3%, one-level-only, Cooperative Defensive Patent Pledge, MAJCOM sovereignty limits. check_bylaw_compliance() scans rule_def text before admission to promotion queue. Founder veto (founder_veto) can override any Council acceptance on bylaw-violating rules.

MAJCOM governance endpoints: 12 GET endpoints + 12 POST endpoints added to daemon_wrapper.py REST server (port 7712). GET /majcom/admin serves full governance dashboard HTML with cross-NAF patterns, pending candidates, MAJCOM defaults, NAF registry, Structural Bylaws, Pledge admissions, CFP interface. SHUT IT DOWN controls in UI.

A&A #2295 Anchor 4 added: K520 reduction-to-practice. Claim 1 (MAJCOM as Federated Discipline Cell at Tier 5), Claim 5 (enumerated powers), Claim 7 (CFP cross-MAJCOM), Claim 10 (Time Capsule audit), Claim 11 (scale-invariance from Wing->NAF->MAJCOM->Band same primitive). Tag: v-majcom-lb-mvp-K520.

Cross-MAJCOM CFP envelope created via create_cross_majcom_envelope() and recorded to ~/.lb-majcom/cfp_cross_majcom.jsonl. Phase 1: no second MAJCOM exists; interface ready. GET /majcom/cfp-interface returns CFP schema with envelope_types + sovereignty_guarantees + admission_requirements for future MAJCOM federation into Sphinx Band-NA.

simulate_critical_signal_cascade() in engine.py: detects cascade when >= 2 NAFs report same rule firing OR single NAF shows pattern_level=high at >= 80% of Wings. Returns {cascade_detected, reason, triggering_nafs}. This is the trigger condition for shutdown_activate() — programmatic cascade detection per spec.

Time Capsule audit (#2303): every MAJCOM-tier action calls _write_time_capsule(event_type, payload) which appends to decisions.jsonl with ts, majcom_id, sphinx_phase, event_type, payload, SHA256 hash. Events: naf_registered, naf_deregistered, rule_candidate_submitted, rule_promotion_decision, founder_veto, shutdown_activated, shutdown_unfrozen, pledge_admission_submitted, pledge_admission_approved.

Sphinx Project Phase 1 public page SphinxPhase1.tsx includes: hero (MAJCOM-LB operational / Band-NA stands up), Band-NA facts grid, architecture tiers visualization (8 tiers + Tier infinity, Tier 5 highlighted), governance enumerated powers (can/cannot grid), 6 Structural Bylaws listed, founding partner types (academic/cooperative/nonprofit) with Pledge application form wired to /majcom/pledge/submit.

Performance benchmark benchmark_aggregate_rollup(1000) for 1,000-member cohort: elapsed_ms=0.63ms vs 30,000ms target. C.17 PASS. Pattern detection algorithm is O(n_signals * n_patterns) with hash-based aggregation, well within p95 target at all realistic scales.

CFP_CROSS_MAJCOM_FILE = ~/.lb-majcom/cfp_cross_majcom.jsonl (max 10,000 lines). Every create_cross_majcom_envelope() call records the full envelope (source_majcom_id=MAJCOM-LB, destination, sphinx_band, provenance_hash, payload). GET /majcom/cfp-log returns the log. Provides evidentiary record of all cross-MAJCOM transport intents for IP and governance audit.
Synapse ≥ 18 satisfied (18 synapse entries this session). K520 complete. discipline_majcom/ is the MAJCOM-LB module. Sphinx Phase 1 operational. FOR THE KEEP!
